title: Shareena Carlson
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Shareena Carlson''' was a [[Wikipedia:Line producer|line producer]] for [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]]<ref name="CW V1">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]]</ref> and producer for [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume Two|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume Two]].<ref name="CW2">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume Two|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume Two]]</ref>

==Filmography==
*[[Wikipedia:Dexter's Laboratory|''Dexter's Laboratory'']] (1996) ... [[Wikipedia:Production manager|Production Manager]]
*[[Wikipedia:The Flintstones: On the Rocks|''The Flintstones: On the Rocks'']] (2001) ... Production Manager

===Awards===
*Primetime [[Wikipedia:Emmy Award|Emmy]] (2003) ... ''Star Wars: Clone Wars''

{{Bio-stub}}
